name: Single Black Dupont Cable
description: You’ve discovered a Single Black DuPont Cable, currently performing its best impression of a structural component. It’s wedged firmly into a piece of C-Channel that was bolted to the wall back in the day for a project that everyone has since agreed to stop talking about. It’s a thin, black line hiding in the 'dead space' above the workstation where no sane person would look for electronics. In an FRC pit, this is how 40% of our wiring ends up—just stuck in a random piece of aluminum because someone needed their hands free to grab a 7/16" wrench and never came back for it.
